content: Login loops after refresh token expires on Windows. App just keeps spinning.
Same issue here. After about 30 min the OAuth token silently expires and I get a white screen.
Schema discovery hangs on huge repos and the docs do not explain the cap. Is there a pagination flag?
LIN-422 - found the same. Coral just times out with no useful error on large catalogs.
Excited for v1.4! Any ETA on the OAuth fix? Blocking our internal deploy.
